reasoning: The baseline rating is ~2473, requiring a 25-point gain to reach the 1% threshold (~2498). For the first two resolution dates (Nov 2 and Nov 25), the rating on Wikipedia will be drawn from the FIDE November list. Gaining 25 classical Elo points in a single month as a 2400+ player with a K-factor of 10 is exceptionally rare, requiring a massive tournament performance (+2.5 over expected score). The probability for Nov 2 is slightly lower than Nov 25 due to the possibility that Wikipedia hasn't yet updated to the November list by Nov 2. For the Jan 24, 2026 resolution date, the Wikipedia page will reflect the FIDE January list, giving the player three months of active play to accumulate 25 points. While difficult, this is historically plausible for a young, active GM (e.g. Vaishali's 30+ point gain in late 2023), so the probability is somewhat higher.
batch_queries: According to Wikipedia, will Vaishali Rameshbabu have an Elo rating on each resolution date listed below that's at least 1% higher than on 2025-10-26?
